summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CRM+ATS platform with both Sales and Recruitment modules. Backend APIs are 100% functional, frontend UI is working well with excellent design implementation.

ui_bugs.issue: Form input fields missing data-testid attributes for automated testing
Logout button not easily discoverable via text selector

design_issues.issue: Console warnings about missing Description or aria-describedby for accessibility

passed_tests: Backend: All 36 API endpoints (100% success rate)
Auth: Login with admin@example.com works perfectly
Sales Dashboard: Displays stats and widgets correctly
Sales Leads: List view with data integration working
Recruitment Pipeline: Kanban view working with candidate data
Recruitment Candidates: List view showing backend data
Module switching: Toggle between Sales and Recruitment works
UI Design: Digital Curator design system implemented correctly
UI Design: Inter font properly loaded
UI Design: Color scheme (Action Blue #004ac6, Tertiary Green #006243) working
Data Integration: Backend data properly displayed in frontend
